forbidden.name: no-runtime-circular
forbidden.comment: Runtime dependency cycles make process startup and module initialization order-dependent.

forbidden.name: no-engine-circular
forbidden.comment: Keep new Engine cycles out. The one documented Engine type-contract cycle is reported separately as a warning below.

forbidden.name: known-engine-contract-cycle
forbidden.comment: Intentional type-only cycle: Engine owns activation construction, while WorkflowActivator receives the Engine contract for diagnostic publication. Keep this visible until that contract has a neutral home.

forbidden.name: renderer-does-not-import-engine
forbidden.comment: The Renderer talks to the desktop runtime through the preload bridge and must not import Engine modules directly, except for the one documented metadata registry below.

forbidden.name: renderer-does-not-import-main-or-preload
forbidden.comment: The Renderer communicates with Main through the preload bridge and must not import process-boundary implementation modules directly.

forbidden.name: renderer-event-payload-metadata-exception
forbidden.comment: Intentional narrow exception: the Renderer currently consumes the Engine's pure event metadata registry. Keep this visible until the registry has a neutral home.

forbidden.name: engine-does-not-import-renderer
forbidden.comment: The Engine is a background runtime and must not depend on Renderer implementation details.

forbidden.name: preload-does-not-import-renderer
forbidden.comment: The preload bridge exposes a stable IPC surface; it must not depend on Renderer implementation details.

forbidden.name: schema-does-not-import-desktop
forbidden.comment: The shared schema package is platform-agnostic and must not depend on the Electron desktop application.
